creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I have the same problem with my desktop (FreeBSD 11 amd64).

The full error is a conflict with gcc version:
..Error while reading shared library symbols:
Dwarf Error: wrong version in compilation unit header (is 4, should be 2) [in module /usr/local/lib/gcc5/libgcc_s.so.1]

Regards
